# Orders

Operations related to orders. Orders are the service orders from customers.

## Operations At A Glance

| Method | Path | Summary | Auth |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/orders` | List orders. | Bearer token required |
| `POST` | `/orders` | Create order. | Bearer token required |
| `GET` | `/orders/{order_id}` | Get order. | Bearer token required |
| `PUT` | `/orders/{order}/billing-address` | Update order billing address. | Bearer token required |
| `GET` | `/orders/{order}/payment-info` | Get payment information an order. | Public |
| `POST` | `/orders/{order}/payments` | Create a manual order payment. | Bearer token required |

## `GET /orders`

List orders.

Lists all orders of a group.

- Operation ID: `get-orders`
- Authentication: Bearer token required
- Related schemas: `ApiError403`, `ApiError404`, `ApiError500`, `ApiFail422`, `OrderCollection`

### Parameters

| Name | In | Required | Schema | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `include` | `query` | No | string | Comma separated list of optional data to include in the response. |
| `filter[search]` | `query` | No | string | Return orders with addresses or customers that match on this string. |
| `filter[payment_status]` | `query` | No | string | Return orders with the specified payment status. Available payment statuses are PAID, PARTIALLY_PAID, and UNPAID. |
| `filter[fulfillment_status]` | `query` | No | string | Return orders with the specified fulfillment status. Available fulfillment statuses are FULFILLED, PARTIALLY_FULFILLED, and UNFULFILLED. |
| `filter[appointment_start_at_gte]` | `query` | No | string (date-time) | Return orders with an appointment starting after this date. |
| `filter[appointment_start_at_lte]` | `query` | No | string (date-time) | Return orders with an appointment starting before this date. |
| `filter[creator_group_id]` | `query` | No | string | Creator group ID used to list orders owned by a specific creator. |
| `filter[tag_ids][]` | `query` | No | array of string (uuid) | Set to include orders with tags that match any of the tags provided. |
| `filter[user_ids][]` | `query` | No | array of string (uuid) | Set to include orders that have appointments with the given users. |
| `sort` | `query` | No | string | Comma separated list of fields used for sorting. Placing a minus symbol in front of a field name sorts in descending order. Defaults to `-created_at`. |
| `per_page` | `query` | No | string | The number of items per page. Defaults to 25. |
| `page` | `query` | No | string | The requested page. Defaults to 1. |

### Request Body

None.

### Responses

| Status | Description | Content |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `200` | OrderCollection | `application/json`: `OrderCollection` |
| `403` | ApiError403 | `application/json`: `ApiError403` |
| `404` | ApiError404 | `application/json`: `ApiError404` |
| `422` | ApiFail422 | `application/json`: `ApiFail422` |
| `500` | ApiError500 | `application/json`: `ApiError500` |
